title: neltuma elata
intro: Neltuma elata, also known as Neltuma, is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae, native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Neltuma elata include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Neltuma elata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
